locale.name: English
setup.title: Trove Setup
setup.language.title: Choose your language
setup.welcome.title: Welcome to Trove
setup.welcome.description: This wizard will set up Trove on your computer. It will install Ollama, download an AI model, and create your admin account.
setup.install.title: Install Ollama
setup.install.description: Ollama is the AI runtime that powers Trove. This step downloads and installs it.
setup.models.title: Choose AI Models
setup.models.description: Select one or more models to download. Only models that fit your computer's memory are shown.
setup.models.at_least_one: Please select at least one model
setup.admin.title: Create Admin Account
setup.admin.description: This account is used to access the Trove admin panel.
setup.service.title: Install as Service
setup.service.description: This installs Trove so it starts automatically when the computer turns on.
manage.title: Trove Management
manage.setup_complete: Setup complete! Trove is now running on your network.
manage.access.title: How to access Trove
manage.access.description: Give this address to anyone on your local network who needs to use Trove. They can type it directly into any web browser.
admin.login.title: Admin Login
admin.documents.delete_folder_confirm: Delete this folder and all its documents? This cannot be undone.
admin.documents.no_folder_selected: Select a folder to view its documents.
admin.documents.too_long_title: Document too long for automatic summary
admin.documents.too_long_body: This document has approximately {{words}} words (~{{tokens}} estimated tokens), which exceeds the model's context window of {{ctx}} tokens. Please enter a short description.
admin.documents.description_placeholder: Brief description of what this document contains
gem.documents.section_hint: Select the folders or individual documents this gem can read.
gem.documents.no_folders: No folders in the document library yet. Add documents in the Documents tab.
admin.network_url.label: Connect from other devices
admin.gem.error.save_failed: Save failed. Check your credentials and try again.
gem.error.run: An error occurred while running this gem.
gem.image_source.title: Add an image
gem.audio_source.title: Add audio
gem.audio_source.record_unavailable: Recording requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Choose a file instead.
gem.error.audio_format: Unsupported audio format. Please use WAV, MP3, OGG, or WebM.
admin.gem.audio_not_supported: Requires gemma4:e2b or gemma4:e4b — current model does not support audio
admin.settings.audio_warning: The selected model does not support audio input. Gems that use audio will be hidden from users.
config.title: Configuration
admin.documents.name_placeholder_url: Defaults to last part of URL
admin.documents.properties_empty: Select a document to view its properties.
help.model.prompt: How do I choose a model?
help.model.title: Choosing an AI model
help.ctx.title: The context window
help.bundle.title: Exporting and importing bundles
help.gem.intro.title: What is a Gem?
help.gem.template.prompt: How do I write a good prompt?
help.gem.template.title: Writing a good prompt template
help.gem.documents.title: Document access
gem.tools.section_hint: Allow the model to call these built-in tools during a run.
gem.tools.datetime.description: Lets the model look up the current date and time.
gem.tools.calculator.description: Lets the model evaluate a mathematical expression.
help.gem.tools.title: Tools
help.gem.tools.content: Tools let the model perform actions during a run — like checking the current date or doing a calculation — before writing its answer. Only enable tools that are relevant to what this gem does.
